# Obsidian Sample Vault – Test Fixtures

## Binary File Sources & Licenses

All files under `obsidian-sample-vault/` including `attachments/` and `notes/` subdirectories:

| File | Source | License |
|------|--------|---------|
| `attachments/vault-logo.png` | 1×1 transparent PNG, generated with Python `PIL` (Pillow) | CC0 / Public Domain |
| `attachments/manual.pdf` | Minimal single-page PDF generated with `reportlab` containing placeholder text | CC0 / Public Domain |
| `notes/screenshot.png` | 1×1 solid-color PNG, generated with Python `PIL` (Pillow) | CC0 / Public Domain |

All binary attachments are programmatically generated minimal files for automated testing only. They contain no copyrighted content, personally identifiable information, or third-party assets.
